session.assistant:
The `make fast-ci` command failed with exit code 2. Here's the summary:
**Status: FAILED**
**Root cause:** Prettier formatting issues with 2 markdown files: - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
**Full output breakdown:**
**Passing checks:** - Lint: All checks passed - Format check: 1605 files already formatted - Markdown check: OK - Exec reference check: OK - Type checking (ty): All checks passed - Unit tests (erk): 5609 passed in 21.92s - Tests (erk-dev): 136 passed in 4.23s - Tests (erk-statusline): 115 passed in 0.81s - Tests (erk-mcp): 27 passed
**Failing check:** - Prettier formatting: Code style issues found in 2 files - `docs/learned/integrations/github-review-decision.md` - `docs/learned/tui/status-indicators.md`
The Prettier warning indicates these markdown files need formatting. All the actual tests and linting passed successfully, but the CI fails because of the formatting issues in the documentation files.
